use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers for SaaS products with feature comparisons
Show membership or service plan options with included/excluded features
Highlight a recommended pricing tier with visual emphasis and scaling
Provide comparison table layout for subscription-based business models
ai_summary: A multi-tier pricing section component that displays pricing cards with title, subtitle, price information, feature lists with check/X icons for included/excluded features, optional badges, customizable buttons, and footer links. Supports a highlighted tier with gradient styling and subtle scaling for emphasis. Responsive grid layout adapts from single column on mobile to three-column grid on desktop with smooth hover transitions.
